title: Origins: Giant and dwarf
description: this mod adds the Giant and Dwarf origins from the More_origins mod
body:
## This mod adds two of the origins form the "more_origins" mod. 

### Giant:

This huge guy is bigger and faster than normal players, but takes more space.



### Dwarf:

this one block tall origins is as fast as a normal player and even more agile. Forget crawling in one block tall places wen you can sprint.
